## Testing

- [ ] `pytest -m "not hardware"` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed code has tests
- [ ] If adding a printer driver: fixture-based byte-level driver test included
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] My changes follow the coding style of the project
- [ ] I have added/updated docstrings where appropriate
- [ ] All new dependencies are necessary and have compatible licenses (no AGPL)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added (if user-visible change)
